validation_message: All 1 diagnoses are consistent and optimal (min_cost=3)

model_answer.explanation: Three faults at minimal cost: or3 stuck-at-0, xor10 stuck-at-0, and or11 stuck-at-0. The stuck-at-0 on or11 forces out1 to 0; the combination of or3 and xor10 faults propagates to produce out2=1 and out3=0 across all tests, matching the observed constant output (0,1,0).

final_answer.explanation: Three faults at minimal cost: or3 stuck-at-0, xor10 stuck-at-0, and or11 stuck-at-0. The stuck-at-0 on or11 forces out1 to 0; the combination of or3 and xor10 faults propagates to produce out2=1 and out3=0 across all tests, matching the observed constant output (0,1,0).
